UpdateSourceArgs: -c "cd \"{{$FullBaseDir}}\" && if [[ -x dotnet/dotnet ]]; then InstalledVersion=$(dotnet/dotnet --version | xargs); else InstalledVersion=\"\"; fi; LatestVersion=$(wget -qO- https://builds.dotnet.microsoft.com/dotnet/release-metadata/8.0/releases.json | grep -oP '\"latest-runtime\":\s*\"\K[^\"]+'); if [[ \"$InstalledVersion\" == \"$LatestVersion\" ]]; then echo \".NET Runtime v$LatestVersion already installed. Skipping\" && exit 0; fi; wget -qO dotnet.tar.gz https://builds.dotnet.microsoft.com/dotnet/Runtime/$LatestVersion/dotnet-runtime-$LatestVersion-linux-x64.tar.gz || { echo \"Download failed from Microsoft CDN. Aborting\"; exit 1; }; rm -rf dotnet/* && tar -xzf dotnet.tar.gz -C dotnet && rm -f dotnet.tar.gz && echo \".NET Runtime v$LatestVersion installed\""
